name: agent-workflow
description: Universal slash commands `/agent-workflow:*` para el runtime `@tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli@^7.0.0`. Hosta los 17 commands canónicos (session, resume, compact, project-init, hub-init, doctor, migrate, rules, 9 export-*) que invocan al CLI npm + leen la SKILL bundleada en `skills/agent-workflow/`. Instalación: `/plugin marketplace add ...` + `/plugin install agent-workflow@<marketplace>`. peerDependency: `@tacuchi/agent-workflow-cli@^7.0.0`.
